lessons: Applied: Tailwind framing -> v4 current (v4.3); flagged v4.3 start-*/end- inset deprecation -> inset-s-*/inset-e-*; MUI version label v6/v7 -> v9 (mechanism @mui/stylis-plugin-rtl unchanged).
